required_fields.label: One-line tagline
required_fields.placeholder: e.g., The operating system for modern logistics

required_fields.label: Problem you solve
required_fields.placeholder: What painful problem does your target customer face? Be specific and quantify if possible...

required_fields.label: Your solution
required_fields.placeholder: How does your product or service solve this problem? What is the core value proposition?

required_fields.label: Business model
required_fields.placeholder: How do you make money? Pricing model, average deal size, sales cycle...

required_fields.label: Traction and milestones
required_fields.placeholder: Revenue, customers, growth rate, key partnerships, product milestones...

required_fields.label: Founding team
required_fields.placeholder: Key team members, their roles, and why they are uniquely qualified to build this company...

required_fields.label: Fundraising ask
required_fields.placeholder: How much are you raising, what round, and how will the funds be used?

optional_fields.label: Market size (TAM/SAM/SOM)
optional_fields.placeholder: Total addressable market, serviceable market, and obtainable market with sources...

optional_fields.label: Key competitors
optional_fields.placeholder: Main competitors and how you differentiate...

optional_fields.label: Financial projections
optional_fields.placeholder: Revenue projections for the next 3-5 years with key assumptions...

optional_fields.label: Current investors
optional_fields.placeholder: Existing investors, advisors, and notable backers...

optional_fields.label: Product demo highlights
optional_fields.placeholder: Key features or workflows to highlight in product slides...

optional_fields.label: Customer testimonials
optional_fields.placeholder: Quotes or case studies from customers...

file_upload_prompts.label: Upload brand guidelines, logo files, or color palette
Upload any existing pitch decks, one-pagers, or investor materials
Upload financial models or projections spreadsheet
Upload product screenshots or demo images

sections.label: Title Slide
sections.instructions: Company name, tagline, and presenter info. Clean and memorable. Set the visual tone for the entire deck.

sections.label: Problem
sections.instructions: Make the pain visceral and relatable. Use data points to quantify the problem. The audience must feel the urgency.

sections.label: Solution
sections.instructions: Show how your product solves the problem. Clear cause-and-effect from problem to solution. Include a product visual or demo screenshot description.

sections.label: Market Size
sections.instructions: TAM, SAM, SOM with clear methodology and credible sources. Bottom-up analysis preferred over top-down.

sections.label: Business Model
sections.instructions: How you make money, pricing structure, unit economics. Show that the model is scalable and defensible.

sections.label: Traction
sections.instructions: Hard numbers: revenue, growth rate, customers, engagement metrics. If pre-revenue, show product development milestones and validation signals.

sections.label: Competition
sections.instructions: Competitive landscape positioning. Use a 2x2 matrix or feature comparison. Show clear differentiation without disparaging competitors.

sections.label: Team
sections.instructions: Key team members with photos, titles, and one-line relevant credentials. Show why THIS team is uniquely positioned to win.

sections.label: Financials
sections.instructions: 3-5 year revenue projections with key assumptions clearly stated. Show path to profitability.

sections.label: The Ask
sections.instructions: Amount raising, use of funds breakdown (percentages), and milestones the funding will enable. Be specific.

sections.label: Closing Slide
sections.instructions: Contact information, website, and a memorable closing statement that reinforces the core thesis.
